title: polypodium azoricum
intro: Polypodium azoricum, also known as Azores polypody, is a species of fern native to the Azores Islands and other parts of the Atlantic Ocean. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Polypodium azoricum are believed to be due to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be made into a tincture or used as a poultice for topical applications.
